case_title: PORTNOY, SEMYON vs. SEMAX ENTERPRISES, INC., A CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: FEES PAID BY APPELLANT SEMAX ENTERPRISES, INC, A CORP

VISITING JUDGE: LEIGHTON HATCH; CLERK-BETH WILBER; REPORTER- BRENDA FIELDS: C/C FOR COURT TRIAL ON A LABOR APPEAL. MS. SMERNOFF PRESENT FOR PLAINTIFF, MR. LEWIS PRESENT FOR DEFENDANT; ALSO PRESENT ARE PLAINTIFF SEMYON PORTNOY AND ARKADIY GUREVICH FOR SEMAX ENTERPRISES. COUNSEL GIVE OPENING STATEMENTS, THEN PRESENT THEIR RESPECTIVE CASES BY CALLING WITNESSES; PROVIDING TESTIMONY AND INTRODUCING EVIDENCE; CONT'D TO 9/19/00 FOR A REBUTTAL WITNESS FOR PLAINTIFF AND CLOSING ARGUMENTS
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SEMAX ENTERPRISES, INC., A CORPORATION
CERTIFICATION OF SERVICE OF PROPOSED STATEMENT OF DECISION BY MAIL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEMAX ENTERPRISES, INC., A CORPORATION $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $4,375.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $366.32 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,741.32, COURT ORD PENALTIES FOR WAITING TIME $6923.20.& 7%INT AFTER JUDGMENT UNTIL PAID IN FULL
PHOTOCOPY FOR PUBLIC
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTNOY, SEMYON AS TO DEFENDANT SEMAX ENTERPRISES, INC., A CORPORATION

JUDGE LEIGHTON HATCH (V.J); CLERK-BETH WILBER; REPORTER- DEBRA LEE LUBIN: CONT'D COURT TRIAL. ALL PRESENT. PLTF. CALLS A REBUTALL WITNESS, PARTIES GIVE FINAL ARGUMENTS, PLTF. GIVES REBUTTAL ARGUMENT AND CASE IS SUBMITTED. JUDGE GIVES TENTATIVE DECISION; PLTF. TO PREPARE PROPOSED JUDGMENT. DEFT'S REQUEST FOR STATEMENT OF DECISION ON WHETHER "GOOD FAITH" DEFENSE PRECLUDES WAITING TIME PENALTY FEES.
